title: Intensely Roasted Russian Beef Stew
description: A hearty and spicy stew featuring tender beef and a rich, glassy jelly broth, made with hot chilli powder and render-fat, perfect for a cozy dinner on a cold night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the render-fat over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are softened and lightly browned.
Add the beef cubes and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the hot chilli powder, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, carrots, and potatoes, and stir to combine.
Cover the Dutch oven and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Remove the stew from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
